subtitle: From Fallen Capital to World Heritage of the Deccan Age

panels.shot: wide aerial view blending ruined Hampi with ghostly overlay of its former bustling bazaar
panels.action: Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu stands in the foreground on a rocky outcrop, looking over the silent ruins of Hampi that faintly shimmer with memories of markets, temples and processions beneath a vast Deccan sky.

dialogue.text: When Hampi fell, the Vijayanagara kings fled—but the idea of their city lived on, until the world itself came to guard its stones.

i18n.hi: हम्पी टूटा, विजयनगर के राजा भागे—but शहर का सपना ज़िंदा रहा, जब तक सारी दुनिया उसकी शिलाओं की रखवाली को न आ खड़ी हुई।

panels.shot: somber wide shot amid blackened ruins and toppled mandapas
panels.action: Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu, dust-streaked and weary, rides slowly through the devastated streets of Hampi, charred pillars and broken gopuras looming around him in a smoky, grey dawn.

dialogue.text: In the wake of the 1565 defeat, Vijayanagara’s great capital lay broken. Markets were silent; shrines stood open to wind and ash.

i18n.hi: १५६५ की हार के बाद विजयनगर की महान राजधानी बिखर गई। बाज़ार सूने, मंदिर हवा और राख के लिए खुले रह गए।

panels.shot: medium close-up from behind as he looks back at Hampi one last time
panels.action: At the edge of the ruined city, Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu reins in his horse, turning for a final, pained look at the sagging silhouettes of Virupaksha’s gopura and shattered palaces against the fading light.

dialogue.speaker: Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu
dialogue.text: The city may fall. The rajya must not.

i18n.hi: नगर टूट सकता है, राज्य नहीं।

panels.shot: map-like bird’s-eye transitioning from Hampi to Penukonda and Chandragiri
panels.action: A stylized Deccan landscape unfurls below, with Hampi fading into the background as banners of Vijayanagara shift first to the hill-forts of Penukonda and then to the greener palace hill of Chandragiri.

dialogue.text: Tirumala Deva Raya led the surviving court south. Penukonda rose as a new seat, then Chandragiri. The dynasty changed, but the name ‘Vijayanagara’ endured.

i18n.hi: तिरुमल देवराय बचे दरबार को लेकर दक्षिण चला। पहले पेनुकोंडा नई गद्दी बनी, फिर चंद्रगिरि। वंश बदला, पर ‘विजयनगर’ नाम बना रहा।

panels.shot: courtly medium shot in a Penukonda audience hall
panels.action: Inside a modest but dignified Penukonda durbar, Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu sits on a low throne, ringed by scribes with palm-leaf records, envoys in mixed South Indian and Islamicate dress, and Brahman advisors in quiet debate.

dialogue.text: In Aravidu halls, Persianate robes brushed against sacred threads. Islamicate titles mingled with Sanskrit epithets. The empire’s court culture, shaped over centuries, did not crumble with stone walls.

i18n.hi: अरविदु महलों में फ़ारसी लिबास जनेऊ से रगड़ खाते थे। इस्लामी ओहदे संस्कृत उपाधियों से घुलते थे। सदियों में बनी दरबारी संस्कृति पत्थर की दीवारों के साथ नहीं टूटी।

panels.shot: slow push-in on inscription being carved
panels.action: A stonecutter in Penukonda chisels a royal inscription, while in the background Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu speaks with temple architects and scholars, scrolls and plans spread before them.

dialogue.text: The Aravidu kings granted lands, repaired shrines, signed firmans. Weakened, hemmed in by new sultanates and chieftains, they still claimed the Sangama, Saluva and Tuluva mantle.

i18n.hi: अरविदु राजाओं ने ज़मीनें दीं, मंदिर सुधरवाए, फ़रमान लिखे। कमज़ोर, नए सुल्तानों और नायकों से घिरे, फिर भी वे संगम, सलुव और तुलुव विरासत पर दावा करते रहे।

panels.shot: wide, lonely shot of Hampi’s landscape decades later
panels.action: The sun sets over an empty Hampi: long shadows from elephant stables, quiet colonnades of the bazaar street, and the Tungabhadra River glinting beyond scattered boulders, with no people in sight.

dialogue.text: Back at Hampi, years turned to decades. The empire’s heartland shifted south, while the old capital slowly became a landscape of memory.

i18n.hi: उधर हम्पी में साल दशक बन गए। साम्राज्य का दिल दक्षिण खिसक गया, पुरानी राजधानी धीरे–धीरे यादों की धरती बनती चली गई।

panels.shot: time-lapse style wide shot across centuries
panels.action: In a single wide frame, the same Virupaksha temple is seen across time: priests and villagers in one corner, colonial surveyors sketching in another, early photographers with tripods in yet another layer.

dialogue.text: Local worship never ceased, and curious eyes kept returning. Scholars sketched, officials mapped, photographers framed the ruins as a riddle from another age.

i18n.hi: स्थानीय पूजा कभी रुकी नहीं, और जिज्ञासु नज़रें बार–बार लौटीं। विद्वानों ने रेखाचित्र बनाए, अफ़सरों ने नक्शे, फ़ोटोग्राफ़रों ने खंडहरों को दूसरी उम्र की पहेली बना फ़्रेम किया।

panels.shot: intimate low-angle shot through carved pillars
panels.action: Looking up from the stone floor between richly carved mandapa pillars, the frame catches delicate reliefs of dancers and warriors, worn yet clear, catching shafts of morning light.

dialogue.text: The stones kept speaking. Battle friezes, traders, gods and musicians remained on their granite stage, waiting for someone to hear the whole story, not only its final battle.

i18n.hi: पत्थर बोलते रहे। युद्ध, व्यापारी, देवता और संगीतकार उसी ग्रेनाइट रंगमंच पर जमे रहे, किसी ऐसे कान का इंतज़ार करते, जो पूरी कथा सुने, सिर्फ़ आखिरी जंग नहीं।

panels.shot: modern-era wide shot with archaeologists at work
panels.action: In a bright twentieth-century scene, Indian archaeologists in field hats carefully clear vegetation around a fallen pavilion, measuring, sketching and tagging each block as villagers watch from a distance.

dialogue.text: In independent India, the site drew new guardians. Archaeologists traced street plans, catalogued shrines and palaces, and argued for Hampi as more than a romantic ruin.

i18n.hi: आज़ाद भारत में यहाँ नए रखवाले आए। पुरातत्वविदों ने सड़कों का नक्शा पढ़ा, मंदिर–महल गिने, और दलील दी कि हम्पी महज़ रूमानी खंडहर से कहीं ज़्यादा है।

panels.shot: interior conference-room shot, map of Hampi projected
panels.action: A modern conference room shows Indian officials and experts seated around a table, a large map of Hampi’s monuments on the wall as they discuss and point to zones of protection.

dialogue.text: They spoke of a whole cultural landscape—river, hills, fields and more than 1,600 monuments—rather than isolated temples. A living region, woven from granite, faith and trade.

i18n.hi: उन्होंने पूरे सांस्कृतिक परिदृश्य की बात की—नदी, पहाड़, खेत और १६०० से ज़्यादा स्मारक—अलग–अलग मंदिर नहीं, बल्कि ग्रेनाइट, आस्था और व्यापार से बुना ज़िंदा इलाक़ा।

panels.shot: symbolic close-up of a UNESCO document on a desk
panels.action: On a polished desk lies an official UNESCO World Heritage certificate titled “Group of Monuments at Hampi,” surrounded by files, stamps, and a small stone fragment from the site.

dialogue.text: In 1986, the Group of Monuments at Hampi entered the World Heritage List. The world now recognized its outstanding universal value, beyond dynasties and borders.

i18n.hi: १९८६ में हम्पी के स्मारकों का समूह विश्व धरोहर सूची में आया। दुनिया ने इसकी अनोखी, सार्वभौमिक महत्ता मान ली—रियासतों और सरहदों से ऊपर।

panels.shot: dramatic wide shot of a modern highway bridge intruding near ruins
panels.action: A broad concrete bridge and roadworks rise near fragile mandapas and boulder hills, construction machinery frozen mid-motion as dust hangs in the air beside ancient stone.

dialogue.text: But new dangers followed. Roads, shops and unchecked growth pressed close to the stones. In 1999, Hampi entered UNESCO’s List of World Heritage in Danger.

i18n.hi: पर नए ख़तरे भी आए। सड़कें, दुकानें, बेलगाम बढ़ता शहर पत्थरों से चिपकने लगा। १९९९ में हम्पी यूनेस्को की संकटग्रस्त विश्व धरोहर सूची में चला गया।

panels.shot: wide shot of community meeting under a tree near the ruins
panels.action: Local villagers, guides, officials and heritage experts sit in a circle under a large tree, the outline of Hampi’s monuments visible behind them as they debate and plan together.

dialogue.text: Saving Hampi meant hard choices. Planning zones, moving some markets, training guides, and balancing local livelihoods with a duty to the past.

i18n.hi: हम्पी को बचाने के लिए सख़्त फैसले करने पड़े। ज़ोन बाँटे गए, कुछ बाज़ार हटे, गाइडों को सिखाया गया, और रोज़गार व इतिहास के बीच संतुलन खोजा गया।

panels.shot: hopeful sunrise wide shot over restored structures
panels.action: At sunrise, scaffolding has vanished from a once-threatened monument, pathways are carefully laid out, and visitors walk along marked routes as caretakers sweep the stone platforms.

dialogue.text: Gradually, protection improved. By 2006, Hampi left the Danger List, not as a frozen museum, but as a guarded, living landscape of memory.

i18n.hi: धीरे–धीरे सुरक्षा बेहतर हुई। २००६ तक हम्पी ख़तरे की सूची से निकला—जमे हुए म्यूज़ियम की तरह नहीं, बल्कि सहेजी हुई, साँस लेती यादों की धरती बनकर।

panels.shot: poetic overlay shot with transparent Tirumala watching modern tourists
panels.action: A translucent, contemplative Tirumala Deva Raya of Aravidu stands among today’s visitors strolling down Hampi’s old bazaar street, his faint figure aligned with the stones as children point at the ruins.

dialogue.text: The Aravidu line ended around 1646, but their world did not vanish. Vijayanagara’s cosmopolitan court, its temples and streets, are now read by scholars, pilgrims and travellers alike.

i18n.hi: अरविदु वंश लगभग १६४६ में मिट गया, पर उनकी दुनिया नहीं। विजयनगर का बहुरंगी दरबार, उसके मंदिर और गलियाँ आज विद्वान, यात्री और तीर्थयात्री मिलकर पढ़ते हैं।

panels.shot: majestic closing aerial shot sweeping along the Tungabhadra
panels.action: From high above, the Tungabhadra River winds past Hampi’s boulder hills, temples, and fields at dusk, the whole landscape glowing softly as if the stones themselves are remembering.

dialogue.text: Sangama, Saluva, Tuluva, Aravidu—many hands built this realm. Hampi endures as their shared testament: a fallen capital that now guides the future as a world heritage of the Deccan age.

i18n.hi: संगम, सलुव, तुलुव, अरविदु—कई हाथों ने यह संसार गढ़ा। हम्पी उनकी साझा गवाही है: गिरी राजधानी, जो अब दक्कन युग की विश्व धरोहर बनकर भविष्य को राह दिखाती है।

title_i18n.en: Hampi Becomes a World Heritage Memory
title_i18n.hi: विश्व धरोहर बनी हम्पी की याद

subtitle_i18n.en: From Fallen Capital to World Heritage of the Deccan Age
subtitle_i18n.hi: गिरी राजधानी से दक्कन युग की विश्व धरोहर तक
